daily_fact: The Minimalist’s Soho Loft showcases innovative design with a focus on sustainability, featuring reclaimed materials and a serene aesthetic that reflects New York City's commitment to eco-friendly living.
topline_md: This week in NYC, expect a weather roller coaster, significant road closures for the St. Patrick's Day parade, and a tragic fentanyl-related death of a child leading to parental charges, alongside ongoing labor disputes and community concerns regarding homelessness and public safety.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
